description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ubuntu:20.04 Docker image and a global before_script that sets DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive, runs apt-get -qq update, installs apt-utils git libgmp-dev libmpfr-dev libmpc-dev libppl-dev plus the PKGS variable, prints the Python version, installs gmpy2>=2.1.0b1 via pip, builds a source distribution with $PYTHON setup.py sdist, and installs the resulting pplpy package from dist/pplpy-*.tar.gz. Define a single stage named test and a job called python3 that runs in this stage. The python3 job sets variables PKGS (python3 python3-dev python3-pip python3-setuptools python3-wheel python3-sphinx cython3 python3-cysignals-bare) and PYTHON (python3), and its script executes "$PYTHON setup.py test" followed by "make -w -C docs html". No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
